en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華告訴摩西說：

en: "On the first day of the first month you shall erect the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.
zh: “正月初一日，你要把會幕的帳幕豎立起來，

en: And you shall put in it the ark of the testimony, and you shall screen the ark with the veil.
zh: 把法櫃安放在裡面，用幔子把法櫃遮蓋。

en: And you shall bring in the table and arrange it, and you shall bring in the lampstand and set up its lamps.
zh: 把桌子搬進去，擺上陳設物；把燈臺也搬進去，把燈臺上的燈盞點著。

en: And you shall put the golden altar for incense before the ark of the testimony, and set up the screen for the door of the tabernacle.
zh: 把燒香用的金壇安放在法櫃前，掛上帳幕的門簾。

en: You shall set the altar of burnt offering before the door of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting,
zh: 把燔祭壇安放在會幕的帳幕門口。

en: and place the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water in it.
zh: 把洗濯盆安放在會幕和祭壇的中間，把水盛在盆裡。

en: And you shall set up the court all around, and hang up the screen for the gate of the court.
zh: 又在周圍豎立院子的幔幕，把院子的門簾掛上。

en: "Then you shall take the anointing oil and anoint the tabernacle and all that is in it, and consecrate it and all its furniture, so that it may become holy.
zh: 你要拿膏油來，抹帳幕和其中的一切器具，使帳幕和帳幕的一切器具成聖，就必成聖。

en: You shall also anoint the altar of burnt offering and all its utensils, and consecrate the altar, so that the altar may become most holy.
zh: 又要抹燔祭壇和壇上的一切器具，使壇成聖，壇就必成為至聖。

en: You shall also anoint the basin and its stand, and consecrate it.
zh: 要抹洗濯盆和盆座，使它成聖。

en: Then you shall bring Aaron and his sons to the entrance of the tent of meeting and shall wash them with water
zh: 要把亞倫和他的眾子帶到會幕的門口來，用水給他們洗身。

en: and put on Aaron the holy garments. And you shall anoint him and consecrate him, that he may serve me as priest.
zh: 要把聖衣給亞倫穿上，又膏抹他，使他成聖，可以作我的祭司。

en: You shall bring his sons also and put coats on them,
zh: 你要把亞倫的兒子帶來，給他們穿上內袍。

en: and anoint them, as you anointed their father, that they may serve me as priests. And their anointing shall admit them to a perpetual priesthood throughout their generations."
zh: 要膏抹他們好像膏抹他們的父親一樣，使他們可以作祭司服事我；他們的膏抹使他們世世代代永遠當祭司之職。”

en: This Moses did; according to all that the LORD commanded him, so he did.
zh: 摩西就這樣作了；凡是耶和華吩咐他的，他都作了。

en: In the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, the tabernacle was erected.
zh: 第二年正月初一日，帳幕就豎立起來了。

en: Moses erected the tabernacle. He laid its bases, and set up its frames, and put in its poles, and raised up its pillars.
zh: 摩西豎立起帳幕，安上柱座，放上木板，安上橫閂，豎立柱子。

en: And he spread the tent over the tabernacle and put the covering of the tent over it, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 把罩棚鋪在帳幕上面，又把罩棚的上蓋放在上面；都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He took the testimony and put it into the ark, and put the poles on the ark and set the mercy seat above on the ark.
zh: 摩西拿了法版，放在櫃裡，把槓穿在櫃的兩旁，把施恩座安放在約櫃上面。

en: And he brought the ark into the tabernacle and set up the veil of the screen, and screened the ark of the testimony, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 把約櫃抬進帳幕裡去，掛上遮蓋至聖所的幔子，把法櫃遮蓋著，是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He put the table in the tent of meeting, on the north side of the tabernacle, outside the veil,
zh: 又把桌子安放在會幕裡，放在帳幕的北面，幔子的外面。

en: and arranged the bread on it before the LORD, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 在桌子上把陳設餅擺在耶和華面前，都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He put the lampstand in the tent of meeting, opposite the table on the south side of the tabernacle,
zh: 摩西把燈臺設立在會幕裡，在帳幕的南面，與桌子相對。

en: and set up the lamps before the LORD, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 在耶和華面前把燈盞點著，是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He put the golden altar in the tent of meeting before the veil,
zh: 把金壇安設在會幕裡，幔子的前面；

en: and burned fragrant incense on it, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 在壇上焚燒芬芳的香，是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He put in place the screen for the door of the tabernacle.
zh: 又掛上帳幕的門簾。

en: And he set the altar of burnt offering at the entrance of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the grain offering, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 把燔祭壇安放在會幕的帳幕門口，把燔祭和素祭獻在壇上；是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He set the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water in it for washing,
zh: 又把洗濯盆安放在會幕與祭壇之間，盆裡盛水，作洗濯之用；

en: with which Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet.
zh: 摩西、亞倫和亞倫的兒子，可以在這盆裡洗手洗腳。

en: When they went into the tent of meeting, and when they approached the altar, they washed, as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 每逢他們走進會幕，或是走近祭壇的時候，就要先洗濯；是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: And he erected the court around the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the screen of the gate of the court. So Moses finished the work.
zh: 摩西在帳幕和祭壇的周圍，豎立起院子的幔幕，又掛上院子的門簾。這樣摩西就完成了工程。

en: Then the cloud covered the tent of meeting, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
zh: 當時，有雲彩遮蓋會幕，耶和華的榮耀充滿了帳幕。

en: And Moses was not able to enter the tent of meeting because the cloud settled on it, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
zh: 摩西不能進入會幕，因為雲彩停在會幕上面，並且耶和華的榮耀充滿著帳幕。

en: Throughout all their journeys, whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the people of Israel would set out.
zh: 在以色列人所有的旅程中是這樣的：每逢雲彩從帳幕收上去的時候，他們就起程；

en: But if the cloud was not taken up, then they did not set out till the day that it was taken up.
zh: 雲彩若是不收上去，他們就不起程，直到雲彩收上去的日子為止。

en: For the cloud of the LORD was on the tabernacle by day, and fire was in it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel throughout all their journeys.
zh: 因為以色列人所有的旅程中，日間有耶和華的雲彩在帳幕上，夜間雲中有火，顯在以色列全家的眼前。
